sections.title: Before delivering their ore during The Fremennik Isles

lines.speaker: Grundt
lines.text: Bored, bored, bored. These Fremenniks are taking ages.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, they're doing their best. You arrived early.

lines.speaker: Grundt
lines.text: Hey, we arrived precisely when we told your representatives. Lack of planning on your part does not constitute an emergency on my part.

lines.speaker: Vanligga Gastfrihet
lines.text: Please, someone get these guys their ore quickly. They are eating all the good food on the island, and complaining about it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd better get a move on!

sections.title: After delivering their ore during The Fremennik Isles

lines.speaker: Grundt
lines.text: Ah, yes. Now that's what I call a meal.

lines.speaker: Vanligga Gastfrihet
lines.text: That's funny, I called it fourteen meals yesterday.
